title: Health check fails: script is not executable
description_md:
The monitoring agent runs as the unprivileged `monitor` user and executes `/usr/local/bin/healthcheck` every minute. Since a config-management run 'normalised' file modes last night, the agent logs `Permission denied` and the health check never runs. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find out why the script won't execute, and fix it.

You're done when the `monitor` user can execute `/usr/local/bin/healthcheck`.
